data.body: Realigned: the workflow-engine eval seam is SHIPPED — Inspect-AI (src/rebar/llm/eval.py, .rebar/evals/<id>.eval.yaml specs, CI-gated) from epic e6d9. The standing per-criterion eval suite wires into it; production prompts live in the SHIPPED da27 prompt library. See epic 5fd2 prerequisite-foundations update.
